MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: PCN-19-303366 Conservatorship of James P. Rhemer and PTR-19-303367 In the Matter of the Rhemer Trust dated July 1, 2011.

Appearances: Lilllan Ng appeared via zoom for Andrea Leung (petitioner).

Ms. Ng stated that selling the property will help pay for conservatees care, that she plans on filing a Petition for authority to sell. Second report and account of conservator etc., is taken under submission. Second report and account of successor trustee is continued to April 10, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Per Judge Ross Moddy Petition for authority to sell property is authorized for April 10, 2024 hearing date.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: Ateesh Datt: Deputy: Chiu: Not reported.

Off Calendar Jun-01-2021 Continued To Jul-06-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lillian Ng, via ZOOM, counsel for Andrea Leung, Trustee.

Court and counsel discuss the status of the accounting in this matter. Counsel advises the court that she has received the accounting and should have it ready for filing within a month.

The court continues the Status of Filing of First Accounting to July 6, 2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204. The court orders that the accounting be filed by June 28, 2021.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
